# General information {.unnumbered}

:::: {.panel-tabset group="globalInfo"}
## About the course 📌

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
**PRACTICAL MULTILINGUAL ONLINE COURSE**

[**Solving problems focused**]{.text-blue}
:::

- **Date:** 2nd July, 2026 (Thursday)
- **Time:** 10 am (GMT-6)
- **Duration:** 3 hours
- **Level:** Intermediate
- **Register to receive the pre-course instructions:** [Google form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSefUomOjP_j8vjOcPbGMwq9MNDOYB0zIHfEV_WMBqhmFxTelQ/viewform)

#### **Instructors:**

- **Thais Crippa de Oliveira, PhD** - Posdoctoral Researcher at UNICAMP, Brazil
- **Evelia Lorena Coss-Navarrete, PhD** - Associate Professor at ENES, Juriquilla-UNAM, México. [Web page](https://eveliacoss.github.io/)

Assistance:

- **Juliana Pinto** - PhD student, UFPA, Brazil
- **Adriana da Silva, PhD** - Post-doc, UNIFESP, Brazil

### 🎯 General Goal

Enable participants to navigate a multimodal dataset (RNA + ADT), perform essential preprocessing, and interpret basic results without getting lost in technical details.

### ✅ Expected Outcomes

- Confidence to open and explore multimodal data.
- Ability to run a basic Seurat pipeline.
- Understanding of how ADT complements RNA.
- Awareness of research questions and limitations in CITE‑seq.

![](flyer/Survival%20Course_ENG.png){fig-align="center" width="405"}

### Citar y reutilizar el material del curso

Course data may be freely reused and adapted with proper attribution. All course data from these repositories is subject to the [Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).

## Prerequisites for the Course

- Verify that all required R packages are installed, following the instructions provided in [Get ready for the workshop](scripts/scSurvival_PreCourse_Setup.html).
- Ensure you have Git, R, RStudio, and Bash properly installed and working on your computer.
- Confirm you have access to a stable internet connection for repository synchronization and package downloads.
::::
